text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
All right, now that we've finished training, let's hit
the road! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: ...Hm? It sounded like someone was calling me...

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: The statue of the Three Goddesses? No way...
